unmapped.WA_ZON_CHRVM: duplicate catalog entry for WAZ319 (mapped to WA_ZON_CHRVL)
unmapped.ME_ZON_HANCC: no NWS zone named Central Hancock; county splits into Interior Hancock (MEZ016) and Coastal Hancock (MEZ029) only
unmapped.ME_ZON_WALDC: no NWS zone named Central Waldo; county splits into Interior Waldo (MEZ022) and Coastal Waldo (MEZ028) only
unmapped.OR_ZON_BLUFH: covers both northern and southern Blue Mountains foothills (ORZ507+ORZ508); no single zone
unmapped.OR_ZON_NWSG: no NWS zone named Northern Wheeler/Southern Gilliam; area straddles ORZ505/ORZ510
unmapped.AK_ZON_ANC1: names NWS office/town (Aniak and Sleetmute), no single public zone
unmapped.AK_ZON_EFAI: names NWS office (Fairbanks) + East Brooks Range region; multi-zone
unmapped.AK_ZON_JUNE: names NWS office only (Juneau); multi-zone SE Alaska product
unmapped.AK_ZON_WFAI: names NWS office (Fairbanks) + West Brooks Range region; multi-zone
unmapped.CA_ZON_EXSW: multi-zone regional (extreme SW California / San Diego area)
unmapped.CA_ZON_SFCEN: multi-zone regional (SF Bay Area + Central California)
unmapped.CA_ZON_WESNE: cross-state multi-zone regional (same NWS product as NV_ZON_WESNE; covers W Nevada + NE California from Reno NWS office)
unmapped.FL_ZON_KEYS: multi-zone regional (all three Keys zones: FLZ076+FLZ077+FLZ078)
unmapped.FL_ZON_MEL: names NWS office only (Melbourne FL); multi-zone regional
unmapped.FL_ZON_MIA: names NWS office only (Miami FL); multi-zone regional
unmapped.FL_ZON_TALL: names NWS office only (Tallahassee FL); multi-zone regional
unmapped.IA_ZON_QUAD: cross-state multi-zone (same NWS product as IL_ZON_QUAD; Quad Cities spans IA/IL border)
unmapped.ID_ZON_POCAT: names NWS office only (Pocatello ID); multi-zone regional
unmapped.IL_ZON_CHIRO: names NWS office only (Chicago/Romeoville IL); multi-zone regional
unmapped.IL_ZON_LINC: names NWS office only (Lincoln IL); multi-zone regional
unmapped.IL_ZON_QUAD: cross-state multi-zone (same NWS product as IA_ZON_QUAD; Quad Cities spans IA/IL border)
unmapped.LA_ZON_NEWOR: names NWS office only (New Orleans LA); multi-zone regional
unmapped.MI_ZON_GAYL: names NWS office only (Gaylord MI); multi-zone regional
unmapped.MO_ZON_KCPHI: names NWS office only (Kansas City/Pleasant Hill MO); multi-zone regional
unmapped.MO_ZON_SPRIN: names NWS office only (Springfield MO); multi-zone regional
unmapped.MO_ZON_STLOU: names NWS office only (St. Louis MO); multi-zone regional
unmapped.NV_ZON_WESNE: names NWS office (Reno NV); cross-state multi-zone regional (same product as CA_ZON_WESNE; covers W Nevada + NE California)
unmapped.OH_ZON_WILM: names NWS office only (Wilmington OH); multi-zone regional
unmapped.TX_ZON_SPLAI: multi-zone regional (South Plains / Lubbock TX area)
